nodes.label: Audio In
nodes.description: Input audio signal entering the root container.chain

nodes.label: Switch
nodes.description: Selects which signal path is active (0 or 1)

nodes.label: control.xfader (Switch mode)
nodes.description: Converts integer Switch value to binary bypass states for each soft_bypass container

nodes.label: soft_bypass sb1
nodes.description: Soft-bypassed container for signal path 0. Active when Switch=0. Contains user processing chain (dummy placeholder).

nodes.label: soft_bypass sb2
nodes.description: Soft-bypassed container for signal path 1. Active when Switch=1. Contains user processing chain (dummy placeholder).

nodes.label: Audio Out
nodes.description: Output signal with only the selected path's processing applied
